element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Immediately available, no enemies present initially
Required to traverse platforms, introduced before enemies
Different movement patterns per enemy type; introduced after movement controls established
Collectible throughout levels; transforms enemies into passive flowers temporarily; replaces raygun from prior games
Instant death on contact; teaches spatial awareness and timing
Grant points and extra lives; optional collection
Reward for exploration; direct life grants
Must collect minimum 12 bombs to defeat final boss; gates progression
Vertical navigation; can climb up or down; expands spatial traversal options
Some levels can be skipped; introduces strategic route choice
Requires 12+ collected bombs; climax encounter after full level progression

typical_relief_triggers: Collecting flower power pellets and neutralizing enemies
Discovering food items and bonus figures
typical_tension_triggers: Encountering enemies with varied attack patterns
Running low on flower power ammunition
Bomb collection requirements creating progression gates
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Moderate pace with escalating challenge; early levels establish mechanics safely, mid-game introduces environmental and enemy complexity, late-game emphasizes resource management (bombs) and boss mastery

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Collectible food, sweet items, and Keen figurines placed off-main-path suggest secrets and optional exploration areas
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Likely elevated or hidden platforms accessible via precise jumps or climbing poles; collectibles signal reward areas

difficulty_curve.early_game: Gentle introduction focusing on movement and jumping fundamentals; minimal enemy pressure and hazards
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increased enemy variety and density; introduction of environmental hazards and climbing mechanics; bomb collection becomes meaningful gating mechanic
difficulty_curve.late_game: Multi-stage platforming challenges combining enemies, hazards, and precise navigation; bomb count requirement creates resource management tension; approach to Boobus Tuber encounter
notable_spikes: First introduction of hazards (water/spikes) transitions from safe to moderate difficulty
Increased enemy density in mid-game outposts and cities
Final boss encounter requires both collected resource (12+ bombs) and combat skill against Boobus Tuber

notable_level_patterns.description: Early levels establish core mechanics (movement, jumping) without significant threat; enemies introduced gradually with predictable behavior patterns
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Opening level on hill with initial potato enemies

notable_level_patterns.description: Mid-game levels structured as distinct zones (outposts, cities) with thematic consistency; increasing enemy variety and density per zone
Levels emphasizing hazard navigation (water, spikes) combined with platforming precision; enemies serve as secondary threat
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Levels featuring water and spike hazards

notable_level_patterns.description: Bomb collectibles (12 minimum required) strategically placed throughout mid-to-late game; progression to final boss gated by acquisition, creating optional-but-necessary exploration incentive
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Pre-boss zones where bomb count becomes critical

notable_level_patterns.description: Final climactic level on Mount Tuberest; Boobus Tuber as capstone challenge requiring collected resources and mastered combat mechanics
